lines: Ha! That was a truly intense fight!
You have won! As proof, here is the EARTHBADGE!
actions.speaker: GIOVANNI

lines: The EARTHBADGE makes POKéMON of any level obey!
It is evidence of your mastery as a POKéMON trainer!
With it, you can enter the POKéMON LEAGUE!
actions.speaker: GIOVANNI

lines: TM27 is FISSURE! It will take out POKéMON with just one hit!
I made it when I ran the GYM here, too long ago...
actions.speaker: GIOVANNI

lines: Having lost, I cannot face my underlings!
I will dedicate my life to the study of POKéMON!
Let us meet again some day! Farewell!
actions.speaker: GIOVANNI
